hero_subtitle: SFTY consolidates KYC, KYT, screening, and case data into one operational layer to give compliance teams a structured view of fragmented risk signals and audit evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Customer risk profiles remain fragmented across providers
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to unify risk signals from KYC, KYT, sanctions screening and case data that exist in separate systems. This fragmentation slows decision-making, weakens audit trails and increases manual workload in ongoing reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes KYC, KYT, screening and case data into one connected compliance operating workflow so teams can review consolidated risk profiles with complete audit evidence and streamlined decision processes.
workflow_title: From fragmented risk signals to review
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates disparate provider outputs into unified risk reviews that flow through cases, decisions and evidence for clearer operational control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented risk profiles. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY unifies fragmented KYC, KYT, screening and case data into structured workflows, decisions and evidence that improve operational control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with integrated risk signals, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment to support clear governance and reliable bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY connect fragmented customer risk profiles
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY connects KYC KYPT and screening results
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports provider-fragmented case reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented risk profiles?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYC, KYT, screening and Travel Rule outputs into a connected operational workflow, consolidating fragmented risk data across customers, wallets and transactions for clearer compliance oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures compliance by routing provider checks into cases, decision logs, regulatory rule updates and reporting workflows within a single platform to reduce manual handoffs and duplication.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision records and supporting evidence, creating audit-ready packages that document compliance actions and support internal or external regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with current onboarding, KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, sitting above them to coordinate workflows without requiring provider replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace your existing KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, workflows and evidence management.
final_title: Connect fragmented risk profiles into one view
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYT, screening and case data into structured workflows and audit-ready compliance records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
